hero.name: I am Nupur
hero.subtitle: Turning data into rigorous, decision-ready insight.

about.title: About Me
about.primary: I'm a statistician and data scientist pursuing my MS in Statistics at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign. I work across applied statistics and machine learning: statistical modeling, causal inference, forecasting, and increasingly NLP and LLM-assisted methods.
about.secondary: Before UIUC I earned a BS in Computational Mathematics and Statistics from MIT-WPU, where my research on an LLM-assisted hybrid approach to hyperparameter optimization was published in IEEE Xplore. The chatbot on this site, Inpersona, is a RAG assistant that answers questions about my work.

items.title: Statistical Consultant
items.description: Analyzed US Census, BLS, and United for ALICE data to surface key drivers of household financial hardship; built Tableau dashboards and geospatial visualizations for community stakeholders.

items.title: Independent Study (Research)
items.description: Modeling human pattern recognition at the intersection of perceptual intuition and computational logic; built NLP pipelines using LLMs to quantify qualitative self-reports into high-fidelity data.

items.title: Undergraduate Researcher
items.description: Built an LLM-assisted framework to refine GridSearchCV, lifting model accuracy 4-5% with fewer samples; engineered Random Forest, HGBoost, and KNN credit-risk models with SHAP and Permutation Importance for transparency.

items.title: IEEE Xplore Publication
items.description: "Grid Search and LLM Assisted Hybrid Approach for Hyperparameter Optimization" — published in IEEE Xplore.

items.title: MS in Statistics, UIUC
items.description: Pursuing a Master of Science in Statistics at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign.

items.title: BS in Computational Mathematics & Statistics
items.description: Graduated from MIT World Peace University, Pune with a GPA of 3.48/4.0.

items.title: Loan Status Prediction
items.description: Processed 60K+ Kaggle loan records and compared Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and Gradient Boosting models, reaching an 82% F1-score on default classification; delivered Excel dashboards that cut reporting time 40%.

items.title: Algorithmic Stock Intelligence
items.description: An LSTM model forecasting 7-day stock-price trends at 85% accuracy, combined with NLP sentiment analysis over 10K+ articles and automated real-time data feeds for continuous market-risk monitoring.

items.title: Inpersona
items.description: A RAG chatbot that answers as me — built on FastAPI and LlamaIndex with knowledge-graph and HyDE retrieval modes, streaming live on this site over WebSockets.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a question about my research or want to discuss an opportunity? I'd love to hear from you!

inpersona.emptyStatePrompt: How can I help you today?
suggestions: What projects have you worked on?

knowledgeGraph.label: Use Knowledge Graph
knowledgeGraph.description: More accurate but less detailed results.

hyde.label: Use HyDE Query
hyde.description: Friendly and detailed results, but may occasionally provide inaccurate information.
